meta.title: Vaktirnar, simple tools for Icelandic families
meta.description: A small studio in Reykjavik building apps that solve one thing, and do it well.

hero.tagline: Simpler shifts, less hassle, more peace

krakkavaktin.name: Krakkavaktin
krakkavaktin.description: An almost-ready solution for parents who want simpler communication and better oversight when kids want to meet and play.

thridjavaktin.name: Þriðja vaktin
thridjavaktin.description: A solution taking shape for tasks and responsibilities that pile up outside the visible schedule.

fyrstavaktin.name: First shift for kids
fyrstavaktin.description: Kids earn points for household chores and get their first taste of responsibility, reward, and a shift of their own.

krakkavaktin.title: Krakkavaktin
krakkavaktin.subtitle: Can Siggi come play?
krakkavaktin.description:
Parents use Messenger, for example, to ask if the kids can hang out. But Messenger is full of other unread messages, emotions and awkwardness that have no place in the context of whether your child is going out to play. Krakkavaktin is just messaging, where the child is always at the centre. Conversations disappear once play is over, making this a true peace of mind tool.

Should I message the mum or the dad, or both? Isn't the aunt with him on Tuesdays? You no longer need to think about this. You just message 'Siggi' and whoever is registered behind Siggi gets the message.
krakkavaktin.messengerQuote: Messenger works, but it's full of everything else you don't want to think about when you're just trying to arrange a playdate. Krakkavaktin is a small, calm place for that one conversation.

features.chat_desc: One question, one answer. No dashboards.
features.child_desc: The conversation is about Siggi, never the parents.
features.disappear_desc: When play is over, so is this.
features.calm_desc: No read receipts, no typing indicators.

krakkavaktin.waitlistDesc: We're putting the finishing touches on it. You'll get one email when it's ready, nothing else.
